ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( OR( ISBLANK(MailingPostalCode), REGEX( MailingPostalCode , "[a-zA-Z]\\d\\s{0,1}\\d[a-zA-Z]{2}"), REGEX( MailingPostalCode , "[a-zA-Z]\\d\\d\\s{0,1}\\d[a-zA-Z]{2}"), REGEX( MailingPostalCode , "[a-zA-Z]{2}\\d\\s{0,1}\\d[a-zA-Z]{2}"), REGEX( MailingPostalCode , "[a-zA-Z]{2}\\d\\d\\s{0,1}\\d[a-zA-Z]{2}"), REGEX( MailingPostalCode , "[a-zA-Z]{2}\\d[a-zA-Z]\\s{0,1}\\d[a-zA-Z]{2}"), REGEX( MailingPostalCode , "[a-zA-Z]\\d[a-zA-Z]\\s{0,1}\\d[a-zA-Z]{2}") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Post Code is not a valid UK format
